'''daladha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pselaphine|pselaphine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pselaphine|pselaphine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| daladha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dælædhæth|dælædhæth]] || [[word:dælædhæj|dælædhæj]] || [[word:dælædhæsh|dælædhæsh]] || [[word:dælædhæ|dælædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dalaladhath|dalaladhath]] || [[word:dalaladhaj|dalaladhaj]] || [[word:dalaladhash|dalaladhash]] || [[word:dalaladha|dalaladha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:daladhath|daladhath]] || [[word:daladhaj|daladhaj]] || [[word:daladhash|daladhash]] || [[word:daladha|daladha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dalafdhath|dalafdhath]] || [[word:dalafdhaj|dalafdhaj]] || [[word:dalafdhash|dalafdhash]] || [[word:dalafdhaf|dalafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:daladhatha|daladhatha]] || [[word:daladhaja|daladhaja]] || [[word:daladhasha|daladhasha]] || [[word:daladhaka|daladhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daladhath|daladhath]] || [[word:daladhaj|daladhaj]] || [[word:daladhash|daladhash]] || [[word:daladha|daladha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:daladhathal|daladhathal]] || [[word:daladhajal|daladhajal]] || [[word:daladhashal|daladhashal]] || [[word:daladhakal|daladhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:daladhathatha|daladhathatha]] || [[word:daladhajaja|daladhajaja]] || [[word:daladhashasha|daladhashasha]] || [[word:daladhaka|daladhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:daladhathan|daladhathan]] || [[word:daladhajan|daladhajan]] || [[word:daladhashan|daladhashan]] || [[word:daladhakan|daladhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:daladhathaoro|daladhathaoro]] || [[word:daladhajaoro|daladhajaoro]] || [[word:daladhashaoro|daladhashaoro]] || [[word:daladhakaoro|daladhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
